task_description: Replace all product images with correct high-quality photos, rewrite descriptions to be export-focused, reorder products per priority list, remove Papaya and Okra, and improve UI for a premium international export company feel.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. All 16 products present in correct priority order. Papaya and Okra removed. UI improvements applied (shadow-xl, gap-10, p-7, line-clamp removed). Committed on main.
